name: Vangelis
bio: Vangelis keeps earning through soundtrack-driven catalog value, ambient listening, and recurring film-world cultural interest.
notable_for: Electronic and cinematic compositions with strong long-tail cultural value.
career_highlight: His best-known soundtrack works remain commercially relevant through sync legacy and streaming discovery.
revenue_drivers: Soundtrack-driven streaming and playlist use support recurring value.
Film legacy keeps the catalog culturally visible.
Ambient and focus listening extend long-tail demand.
